semantic.role: Prompt Template Rendering Utility — generates standardized Markdown text blocks for constructing AI agent prompts and structured documents within the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Generate a formatted identity block that declares the role and target for the user of the generated document.
Generate a formatted instructions block enumerating critical instructions as a numbered list.
Generate a context block wrapping input data in an XML-style tag derived from the title.
Generate an environmental context block describing the current Git branch and status, or an empty string if both are absent.
Generate a rule violation check block that wraps rule data in a structured tag, or empty if no data.
Generate a Git intent block that wraps a commit message in a structured tag, or empty if no intent.
Generate a JSON schema block that wraps the schema in a Markdown code fence tagged with ---JSON---.
Generate a source content block wrapping content in a labeled XML-style tag, or empty if no content.
outOfScope: Any form of conditional logic beyond simple falsiness checks
invariants: Functions renderContextBlock, renderEnvironmentalContextBlock, renderRuleViolationCheckBlock, renderGitIntentBlock, and renderSourceContentBlock return an empty string when their main data parameter is falsy.
renderInstructionsBlock always prepends 'CRITICAL INSTRUCTIONS:\n' before the enumerated list.
renderJSONSchemaBlock always returns a string with the exact delimiter line '---JSON---'.
The output of each function is a plain string; no formatting beyond Markdown and templating.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a modular set of pure rendering functions that compose standardized text blocks for AI agent prompts and structured document generation.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: 0c6bd73 ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era. This module supports the governance layer by providing reusable formatting blocks for generating prompt summaries and structured outputs.

publicSurface.description: Returns a Markdown string that introduces the role and target for the generated document. Used at the beginning of prompt documents to define the agent's persona.
Returns a numbered list of critical instructions prefixed with 'CRITICAL INSTRUCTIONS:'. Consumed by modules that assemble multi-step instruction blocks for agents.
Returns a heading and an XML-style block tag containing context data, or an empty string if no data. Used to wrap arbitrary input data for analysis.
Returns a heading and a tag block with Git branch and status information, or empty if both parameters are empty. Called to inject repository state into prompts.
Returns a heading and a block tag containing rule data, or empty if no data. Used to include architectural rule content in agent prompts.
Returns a heading and a block tag containing the most recent Git commit message, or empty if none. Used to communicate historical intent to analysis agents.
Returns the required JSON output schema wrapped in Markdown code fence with the '---JSON---' delimiter. Used to enforce structured output format in agent responses.
Returns a heading and a block tag containing source code content, or empty if no content. Used to embed file contents into prompts for analysis.
